title: fix(deps): update module github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl to v1 - autoclosed
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl) | require | major | `v0.1.0` -> `v1.0.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl (github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl)</summary>

### [`v1.0.0`](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/releases/tag/v1.0.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/compare/v0.1.0...v1.0.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Add checkpointctl version by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/42](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/42)
-   make: Add install and uninstall targets by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/41](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/41)
-   Use golang 1.20 for binary test code coverage by [@​adrianreber](https://togithub.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/44](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/44)
-   Add '--mounts' option by [@​sankalp-12](https://togithub.com/sankalp-12) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/43](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/43)
-   Show test results in GitHub PRs by [@​adrianreber](https://togithub.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/45](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/45)
-   Add alias and '--all' option to checkpointctl show by [@​sankalp-12](https://togithub.com/sankalp-12) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/46](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/46)
-   Show name of actual checkpoint archive by [@​adrianreber](https://togithub.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/50](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/50)
-   ci: verify go.mod and vendor directory by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/58](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/58)
-   Optimize archive unpacking by [@​behouba](https://togithub.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/55](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/55)
-   ci: add job to check increase in binary size by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/59](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/59)
-   fix(ci): set git credentials for rebase by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/62](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/62)
-   refactor: move table rendering into own funcs by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/60](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/60)
-   test/check-size: show error if make fails by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/63](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/63)
-   test: generate checkpoint image files for tests by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/61](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/61)
-   feat: add flag to view process tree by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/56](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/56)
-   fix(ci/check-size): use latest non-merge commit by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/72](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/72)
-   fix: remove redundant nodes in process tree by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/71](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/71)
-   Build static checkpointctl binary for improved portability by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/65](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/65)
-   show: add support for listing multiple checkpoints by [@​behouba](https://togithub.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/67](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/67)
-   feat: add new `inspect` sub-command by [@​behouba](https://togithub.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/76](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/76)
-   chore: remove extra deprecated flag by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/82](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/82)
-   fix: capitalisation in tree output by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/83](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/83)
-   feat: display file descriptors by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/74](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/74)
-   Update README.md by [@​behouba](https://togithub.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/85](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/85)
-   tree: show mounts after pstree by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/88](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/88)
-   feat: filter by PID in process tree by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/87](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/87)
-   fix: remove `us` for pages scanned and pages written by [@​behouba](https://togithub.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/92](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/92)
-   feat: display process tree with command line arguments by [@​behouba](https://togithub.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/89](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/89)
-   feat: display process tree with environment variables by [@​behouba](https://togithub.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/90](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/90)
-   inspect: enable --ps-tree-{env,cmd} with --all by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/96](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/96)
-   readme: add instructions for autocompletion by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/97](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/97)
-   stats: use time units in human-friendly format by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/98](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/98)
-   chore(deps): update go-criu by [@​behouba](https://togithub.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/99](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/99)
-   feat: add `memparse` sub-command by [@​behouba](https://togithub.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/95](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/95)
-   readme: fix example code format by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/100](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/100)
-   inspect: show size of memory pages by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/101](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/101)
-   tree: use sub-nodes for open files and env vars by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/102](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/102)
-   feat: display sockets in process tree by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/94](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/94)
-   memparse: show process shared memory size by [@​behouba](https://togithub.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/103](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/103)
-   docs: Add man pages for checkpointctl by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/105](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/105)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​sankalp-12](https://togithub.com/sankalp-12) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/43](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/43)
-   [@​behouba](https://togithub.com/behouba) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/55](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/55)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/compare/v0.1.0...v1.0.0

</details>
